stemHtml: Which one of the following statements is true?

options.a: The floor loading limit is equal to MTOM-BEM.
options.b: The orientation of a specified cargo container within a cargo hold will not affect the running load.
options.c: Running load is the maximum load tolerated per unit of area (i e kg/m2).
options.d: Cargo may be loaded into a passenger compartment, provided that it is secured according to applicable regulations in EU-OPS 1.
